summary: All seven requirements appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-1 (rebrand to Mahveer Finance) is covered across index.html, Header, Footer, LandingPage, and AdminPage. REQ-2 (remove Caffeine footer) is done in Footer.tsx. REQ-3 and REQ-4 (Login/Register pages) are created as new files. REQ-5 (header nav links) is implemented in Header.tsx. REQ-6 (auth flow with localStorage, admin guard, logout) is implemented via useAuth hook and AdminPage changes. REQ-7 (router registration) is done in App.tsx. One constraint violation is noted: a file was added under frontend/src/hooks/ which is an immutable path per the build request constraints.

hallucinated_features.description: A new file frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts was created, violating the constraint that no files under frontend/src/hooks/ should be modified or added.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states 'Do not modify any file under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths).' Adding a new file to this directory violates the immutable path constraint.
